strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with direct TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB exposure matching the primary stack
Active AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at current role, directly satisfying the AI agent development requirement
Deep testing culture demonstrated through TDD practice, open-source test runner (Trial), and assertion library (Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere in the resume despite it being the primary backend framework
Kotlin/Java exposure is minimal — only a brief mention for robotic arms at Altom, well below the secondary-stack expectation
Vitest and Playwright are not referenced; testing expertise is evident but not in the specific frameworks listed as requirements
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong fullstack generalist whose current role at re:cinq directly maps to the position's core needs — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and AI-agent infrastructure work all appear in his recent experience. The most notable gap is Nest.js, which is the team's primary backend framework and is absent from the resume; given his Node.js depth and pattern of quickly adopting new tooling across many stacks, this is likely bridgeable, but it represents real onboarding friction. Limited Kotlin/Java background is a softer concern given those are secondary technologies.
